raw_consumer_statement:
Took my son 's car into XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX location on XX/XX/year>. It needed a new alternator. They replaced the alternator with a cheap part. We paid {$810.00} and drove away. XXXX hours later the warning light came back on. We took it back to them and they " ran diagnostics '' and declared that we needed to take the car to XXXX to get the XXXX replaced ( electronic control module ). 

I took the car to XXXX XXXX that day. They put a new, better quality alternator on and charged a little over {$600.00}. It has worked perfectly since. 

American Express, despite having all the documentation is refusing to reverse the charge, stating that XXXX XXXX XXXX says I paid for the service, which I did- i ca n't drive my car away without paying.
